title: ジャパンカップの後に・ここから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is defeated by El Condor Pasa, but
the loss ignites a fire within her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two vow to become even stronger as they
leave the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, as Special Week heads home, Grass
Wonder appears and challenges her to determine
who is stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Special Week steps up to race against
Grass Wonder the Beast at the Arima Kinen!
